html:
Purifier Room

Exclusive to:
In Purifier Room, their are 2 set of Inner Sanctum Barriers. All players have to get to middle section and pull the Lever to activate the Sanctum Purifiers in order to lower the back Inner Sanctum Barriers to access the Sanctum Waymark to the Key Room.

Inner Sanctum Barrier

“Keeps the nightmares out.”

-

Inner Sanctum Barrier works as a one way passage. Only one side of the Barrier is down. Every time the player wants to go to the other side has to pull the Lever and activate the Purifiers.

When the back Barrier is down, the middle section has a strong sanity aura to vastly increase player's sanity.

Sanctum Purifier

“Cleanses the rotten nightmares right out of you. What's so important here it must be kept away from the shadows?”

-

Once activated, the Sanctum Purifier washes away all Shadow Creatures within its area of effect.

When player is hit by Sanctum Purifier mist:

Trivia

  • The Purifier Room was introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.
plainText:
Purifier Room
Exclusive to:
In Purifier Room, their are 2 set of Inner Sanctum Barriers. All players have to get to middle section and pull the Lever to activate the Sanctum Purifiers in order to lower the back Inner Sanctum Barriers to access the Sanctum Waymark to the Key Room.
Inner Sanctum Barrier[edit | edit source]
Inner Sanctum Barrier
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
"vault_decon_door"
“Is it meant to keep something in, or keep something out?”
–Wilson
“Pfft. Some dumb wall isn't going to stop me.”
–Willow
“Would be hard for even mighty Wolfgang to break down.”
–Wolfgang
“If only it was that easy to shut the world out...”
–Wendy
“IT LOOKS LIKE A PRIMITIVE DECONTAMINATION ROOM”
–WX-78
“These walls must have been constructed with utmost care to remain in such pristine condition.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't like feelin' penned in.”
–Woodie
“Impressive. I'm starting to see why our assistance was necessary...”
–Maxwell
“Nö barricade can cöntain me!”
–Wigfrid
“It's way too high for us to climb over.”
–Webber
“It seems they were very particular about who was invited in.”
–Warly
“Up and down, up and down”
–Wormwood
“Pretty heavy-duty. They must've really wanted to keep this place secure.”
–Winona
“Walls have never posed a problem for me, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Glurgh. Big wall not gonna keep me out!”
–Wurt
“There's just gotta be something important inside!”
–Walter
“A bit claustrophobic, isn't it?”
–Wanda
“Keeps the nightmares out.”
-
Inner Sanctum Barrier works as a one way passage. Only one side of the Barrier is down. Every time the player wants to go to the other side has to pull the Lever and activate the Purifiers.
When the back Barrier is down, the middle section has a strong sanity aura to vastly increase player's sanity.
Sanctum Purifier[edit | edit source]
Sanctum Purifier
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
"vault_decon_mister"
“How mysterious...”
–Wilson
“You'd better not spray anything at me again!”
–Willow
“Chases scary shadows away. Wolfgang like!”
–Wolfgang
“Even if you manage to chase away the darkness, it always comes back.”
–Wendy
“IT HAS IDENTIFIED SHADOWS AS A CONTAMINANT”
–WX-78
“It seems designed to expel contaminants from the area.”
–Wickerbottom
“Reminds me a bit of a sweat lodge.”
–Woodie
“How troublesome.”
–Maxwell
“Defenses against dark magicks.”
–Wigfrid
“That was fun!”
–Webber
“I suppose the way it works has been lost to time.”
–Warly
“Spritz spritz!”
–Wormwood
“Seems like a pretty fancy setup.”
–Winona
“Spray your troubles away!”
–Wortox
“Do again! Do again!”
–Wurt
“Excuse me, mister! Heh. Get it? Because it sprays that misty stuff!”
–Walter
“Quite a handy device. I wonder if it would be possible to build a portable version.”
–Wanda
“Cleanses the rotten nightmares right out of you. What's so important here it must be kept away from the shadows?”
-
Once activated, the Sanctum Purifier washes away all Shadow Creatures within its area of effect.
When player is hit by Sanctum Purifier mist:
“Ha! You mist!”
–Wilson
“Hey! What's with this weird spray?!”
–Willow
“Strange mist feels good on skin... and in head!”
–Wolfgang
“Can it truly purge all the darkness from my heart?”
–Wendy
“ELIMINATING CONTAMINANTS”
–WX-78
“Ah... my mind feels clearer, somehow.”
–Wickerbottom
“Clears the head and opens up the pores!”
–Woodie
“Ugh! It burns!”
–Maxwell
“It döth banish the shadöws!”
–Wigfrid
“That spray tickles!”
–Webber
“Whatever it did, my head feels much clearer now.”
–Warly
“Feel nice!”
–Wormwood
“Huh. It actually chased away the shadows.”
–Winona
“Refreshing!”
–Wortox
“Oooh, feel good on scales, florp!”
–Wurt
“Huh. Is it just me, or does the atmosphere in here feel lighter?”
–Walter
“It chases off the shadows. Good.”
–Wanda
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Purifier Room was introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
In Purifier Room, their are 2 set of Inner Sanctum Barriers. All players have to get to middle section and pull the [[Lever]] to activate the Sanctum Purifiers in order to lower the back Inner Sanctum Barriers to access the [[Sanctum Waymark]] to the [[Key Room]].
